task: C0 M1 Correction 2 Inspector Restore, Void Echo and Membrane Colour Truth
owner_observed_issue_disposition: Escape cancellation and blur status are fixed through one shared edit-session state machine used by Inspector and Table Name, Area and Body controls.
Appearance is presented as Cell, Membrane and Void while retaining Surface, Boundary, Core, Field, Edge, Fill and Void Edge canonical targets.
The bounded creation, utility and export actions remain in the bottom bar, with one-click Inspector and active-family Detail launchers restored.
Cell Surface and Boundary controls are executable and renderer-tested in Classic and Organism modes.
Organism renders six truthful Boundary styles, including a real rounded dash-dot pattern, through the existing pointer-transparent overlay.
Void behavior was regression-protected without redesign after no defect was reproduced.
Core-off white centre dots were traced to the Canvas2D/WebGL debug centre-dot route; production cell-field debug now renders rings only while the isolated lab retains its explicit debug dot.
There remains exactly one Inspector: Content and Appearance are M1 tabs, Symbol is reserved as a future tab in this Inspector for M2, and Material Browser remains M4.
verification_summary: all src/**/*.test.ts files passed through npx --yes tsx, including executable correction behavior and renderer tests
npx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.app.json --pretty false passed with zero diagnostics
exactly one final npm run build passed with the accepted Vite large-chunk warning only
deterministic built-artifact QA passed at 1440x900 and 1280x800 with zero browser errors or warnings
PNG, SVG and PDF clean export flows each reached Complete
known_limitations: Membrane Field and Edge are shared project fields and therefore edit Project Defaults rather than disconnected per-Cell overrides.
Organism has no truthful vector Membrane path; M1 does not synthesize one.
Advanced instruments, selection-orbit treatment and Symbol remain assigned to M2 inside the same Inspector.
Material Browser remains assigned to M4.
The in-app browser does not expose file-saver transport as a download event; product completion state and deterministic export contracts were verified.
